arts.sum: Bromley come into the game having won their last three games and haven't conceded in either of them. They are now unbeaten in their last four games. Bradford's 2-0 win over MK Dons at the weekend mad...

arts.ttl: Preview: Bromley vs. Bradford City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League Two clash between Bromley and Bradford City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
